name: Flora Purim
abstract: Flora Purim (born March 6, 1942) is a Brazilian jazz singer known primarily for her work in the jazz fusion style. She became prominent for her part in Return to Forever with Chick Corea and Stanley Clarke.

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Chick Corea
Kool Jazz Festival: Tropical Surge: The Afro-Brazilian Sensation
JVC Jazz Festival: The Dizzy Gillespie United Nation Orchestra

about_quotes.evidence: I heard Chick Corea and Return to Forever... with Joe Farrell and Flora Purim and Stanley Clarke

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: This is when Stanley had just come from Philadelphia, and also Airto and Flora had come from Brazil. He was doing all those new tunes, Captain Marvel and Spain and . . .
